name: nudgebee
description: Unified CloudOps platform with AI-SRE, AI-FinOps, AI-K8sOps, and the Agentic Automation Builder without fragmented tools, context switching, or model lock-in.
summaryZh: Unified CloudOps platform with AI-SRE, AI-FinOps, AI-K8sOps, and the Agentic Automation Builder without fragmented tools, context switching, or model lock-in. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
